mapper.sql: m.model_id, m.provider_id, p.provider_code, p.provider_name, m.model_code, m.model_name, m.supports_vision, m.supports_web_search, m.supports_json_schema, m.enabled, m.remark, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clinic_ai_model m LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_provider p ON p.provider_id = m.provider_id WHERE m.model_id = #{modelId}
SELECT FROM clinic_ai_model m LEFT JOIN clinic_ai_provider p ON p.provider_id = m.provider_id WHERE m.enabled = 1 ORDER BY p.provider_name ASC, m.model_name ASC, m.model_id ASC
